Cold Therapy

Ice Bath & Cold Plunge

Cold water immersion at 3–15°C reduces systemic inflammation, spikes norepinephrine by up to 300%, and triggers deep parasympathetic recovery.

Cold Plunge · Electric

Arctic Pro Cold Plunge

Maintains 3–15°C year-round. Built-in chiller, UV filtration and precise digital temperature control.
